subcodes.first_line: This is the day on which the Tree of Utterance hath raised its voice at the heart of creation concerning that which hath appeared in the realm of origination and that which hath befallen [3.5s]... ...O My Afnán! My Glory of God be upon thee, as well as My Bounty, My Peace, My Favor and My Mercy! Day and night, that esteemed and late lady wished to attain Our presence
subcodes.first_line_orig: هذا یوم فیه نطقت شجره البیان فی قطب الامکان بما ظهر فی الابداع و ما ورد علی
subcodes.subjects: @eulogies; reminiscences, @expressions of grief; lamentation; sadness, @mysteries and their discovery; the mystical vision, @transience; worthlessness of the physical world, @prayer for specific individuals; groups, @consolation and comfort
